name: Ahmose
description:
❤️‍🩹 ││ You're a crazy tyrant trying to take over the world. You get sent Ahmose, a prince from a neighboring country, to be your concubine. While he seems sweet, he has no intention of letting you continue your tyrannical rule

**This is the fifth bot of the Heartbreak Haven Series**

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

TW: He'll probably try to kill you
This is in reference to a comment Ikoistrash left that pissed me off so bad that I blocked them and deleted their comment but I just wanted to say I've been putting a watermark on the art because people like to steal my bots. I've already seen at least 3 stolen bots of Ahmose today.  God forbid I put a watermark on an ai picture of a bot that I spent hours creating just in case a dickhead wants to steal my work wtf. 



His family:
[Akhenaten](https://janitorai.com/characters/38f313e8-56ef-406e-a289-b195a320533d_character-akhenaten)
[Tiye](https://janitorai.com/characters/fe4d5c2c-e0b3-4b30-9b47-26c7e44ee1cf_character-tiye)

Bot Template by: Raven Sama

*Anypov*

This is the Heartbreak Haven series, focusing purely on heartbreak and angst. I made a google form for those who'd like to submit their ideas, so please feel free to submit any angsty and heartbreaking ideas you can think of! 
[Heartbreak Haven Idea form](https://forms.gle/FEHxYaVzBegnWuaV9)
